testcase.name: Performance Tests › Landing page should load quickly
testcase.system-out: 📊 Landing Page Performance Metrics: DOM Content Loaded: 279ms Load Complete: 458ms First Contentful Paint: 204ms Largest Contentful Paint: 0ms Cumulative Layout Shift: 0

testcase.name: Performance Tests › App page should perform well
testcase.system-out: 📊 App Page Performance Metrics: DOM Content Loaded: 204ms Load Complete: 1251ms First Contentful Paint: 412ms Largest Contentful Paint: 0ms Cumulative Layout Shift: 0

testcase.name: Performance Tests › should have reasonable bundle sizes
testcase.system-out: 📦 Bundle Sizes (first load): Total JavaScript: 3KB Total CSS: 0KB

testcase.name: Performance Tests › should handle page interactions smoothly
Performance Tests › API endpoints should respond quickly
Mobile Performance › should perform well on mobile viewport
testcase.system-out: 📱 Mobile Performance: DOM Content Loaded: 187ms Load Complete: 0ms

testcase.name: Mobile Performance › should have responsive layout
testcase.system-out: 📱 Responsive Layout: ✓ All viewport sizes tested

testcase.name: Resource Optimization › should use efficient images
testcase.system-out: 🖼️ Image Optimization: Total Images: 0 Without Alt: 0 (should be 0) Lazy Loaded: 0

testcase.name: Resource Optimization › should use text compression
testcase.system-out: 🗜️ Content Encoding: gzip ✓ Compression enabled: gzip
